bibliographic_info.title: Assessment of precipitable water vapor retrieved from precise point positioning with PPP-B2b service

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  Earth Science Informatics (2023) 16:315–328 https://doi.org/10.1007/s12145-023-00939-3 RESEARCH Assessment of precipitable water vapor retrieved from precise point positioning with PPP‑B2b service Hao Yang1,2 · Xiufeng He1 · Vagner Ferreira1 · Shengyue Ji2 · Ying Xu3 · Susu Song4 Received: 14 November 2022 / Accepted: 11 January 2023 / Published online: 19 January 2023 © The Auth
The PPP-B2b service of the BeiDou satellite navigation system (BDS) provides RTS via satellite, which is suitable for PWV retrieving without the influence of network issues.
